home.title: Translating Complex Data into Intuitive Decisions

home.description:
Offering deep cross-disciplinary expertise. I am more than a Data Analyst—I provide comprehensive services in: 
[Data Analysis Teaching], [Custom Business Reports/Dashboards], [Portfolio/Project Guidance], and [MarTech/Automation Integration] 
to uncover the highest commercial value from vast amounts of data.
